auth.unauthorized_desc: You do not have permission to access this page. Please make sure you are logged in with the correct account.

consent.essential_desc: Required for saving your survey and generating your AI report.
consent.analytics_desc: Anonymous usage data to improve our service quality.

email_capture.error_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
email_capture.error_server: Something went wrong. Please try again.
